# Dylan McDermott

> Meteorologist and geospatial data professional specializing in operational weather analysis, geospatial automation, field sensing, remote sensing, and atmospheric research.

## Professional profile

- Location: West Des Moines, Iowa, USA
- Current role: Weather and Catastrophe Analyst at Property & Liability Resource Bureau (2025–Present)
- Contact: dylanddermott@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dylan-mcdermott-193b18174/

## Experience and research

- Operational weather analysis, geospatial products, automation, and catastrophe decision support at PLRB.
- Field-sensing systems, quality-controlled geospatial analysis, Python, ArcPy, drone imagery, and LiDAR at Corteva Agriscience.
- M.S. research at Iowa State University on historical land-use change, Midwest rainfall, and mesoscale convective systems using WRF and Noah-MP.
- Undergraduate boundary-layer meteorology research at Iowa State University.

## Skills

Meteorology, radar applications, numerical weather prediction, remote sensing, ArcGIS Pro, ArcGIS Enterprise, ArcPy, GeoPandas, Rasterio, Python, pandas, xarray, NetCDF, GRIB, GeoTIFF, TypeScript, React, FastAPI, AWS, SQL, PostgreSQL, Git, GitHub, and Linux.

- Portfolio: https://dylanmcd16.github.io/
